name: playbook-forge
description: Genera HTML documents v7 con dual-engine: SPA mode (ecosystem/forensic/elrepo, 38 gates, modales JS, bilingual) + Paginated mode (ask/preview/qa/proposal/annex, 20 gates, A4 print-first, 0 JS). Multi-brand parametrizable: Sofka v5.1, MetodologIA Neo-Swiss, ElRepo Dark, Generic. 5 paginated formats (4-101 paginas), 13 flujos AI-native, 5 katas Shu-Ha-Ri, 65+ modals interactivos, prompts copiables con EXITO, Google Calendar auto-deploy. 3-layer determinism: specs + templates + engine.
